companies.name: Charles Hudson Technology Solutions (Nagarro)
companies.details: Working as a Backend AI / Performance / DevOps Engineer. Designing and executing enterprise-scale load tests (10,000+ concurrent users) via LoadRunner. Designing and implementing agentic AI systems using LangGraph, OpenAI, and LangChain for anomaly detection and automated incident triaging, and performing deep JVM heap and GC profiling via Dynatrace.

companies.name: TheraPz
companies.details: Worked as a Software Engineer (Full Stack & DevOps). Built a pediatric therapy platform using React, Spring Boot, and PostgreSQL, integrated a clinical assistant using LangChain, OpenAI, and FAISS, and set up Dockerized CI/CD pipelines on AWS EC2.

companies.name: Cognizant Technology Solutions
companies.details: Worked as a Programmer Analyst (Backend, Full Stack & DevOps). Developed Java Spring Boot microservices for enterprise clients (Dell EMC UK, Maersk Air Cargo). Built CI/CD pipelines via Jenkins, Maven, and Ansible, containerized applications using Docker/Kubernetes on OpenShift, and automated AWS EC2 instance provisioning.
